name: 神力碾壓復仇
description: 女主用超自然神力直接碾壓世俗權力體系中的敵人，這種「降維打擊」帶來的爽感遠超普通的商戰復仇，因為力量差距是根本性的、不可逆的。

examples.drama_title: Revenge of the Reborn Heiress: Disowned, I Awakened My Divine Power & Bankrupted My Family Overnight
examples.excerpt: Awakened My Divine Power... Using her secret identity and supernatural powers, she crushes her enemies
